## Daily Baby Activities

### Morning Routine (6 AM - 12 PM)
- **Tummy Time** (6:30 AM - 7:00 AM): 15 minutes of supervised tummy time on soft mat
- **Reading Time** (9:00 AM - 9:30 AM): Read soft cloth books with high-contrast images
- **Sensory Play** (10:30 AM - 11:00 AM): Gentle textures and soft sounds exploration

### Afternoon Routine (12 PM - 6 PM)
- **Tummy Time** (1:30 PM - 2:00 PM): Practice head control during extended tummy time
- **Reading Time** (3:00 PM - 3:30 PM): Interactive picture books with tracking practice
- **Gentle Movement** (4:30 PM - 5:00 PM): Slow rocking and cuddling with soft music

### Evening Routine (6 PM - 10 PM)
- **Quiet Time** (6:30 PM - 7:00 AM): Calm environment preparation for bedtime
- **Reading Time** (8:00 PM - 8:30 PM): Bedtime stories with soothing voice
- **Bedtime Routine** (9:30 PM - 10:00 PM): Sleep preparation with gentle routine
